div.style: display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:#f1f3f7; color:var(--primary); font-size:36px;

width:85px; height:85px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--main-color); color:#fff; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin:0 auto; font-size:36px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(77, 11, 122, 0.15); font-weight:bold;

div.p: © All Rights Reserved to - document.write(new Date().getFullYear())
